info.description: This is an API documentation of BE Plant Factory.
info.title: BE Plant Factory API

parameters.description: URL to redirect to after successful login (optional, overrides default success redirect URL)
parameters.name: redirect_url

200.description: Google login URL retrieved successfully. Available code (SUCCESS)

400.description: Invalid redirect URL provided. Available code (INVALID_REDIRECT_URL)

500.description: Failed to retrieve Google login URL. Available code (INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)

302.description: Redirects to the failure URL with error code as query parameter. Available code (INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, INVALID_STATE, PROVIDER_ERROR, TOKEN_EXCHANGE_FAILED, INVALID_CALLBACK, FAILED_CALLBACK, USER_STATUS_INACTIVE, USER_STATUS_BANNED)

post.description: Logout the currently authenticated user by invalidating their session and tokens

200.description: User logged out successfully. Available code (SUCCESS)

401.description: Unauthorized - user is not authenticated. Available code (UNAUTHORIZED)

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's information

200.description: Current user retrieved successfully. Available code (SUCCESS)

401.description: Unauthorized - user is not authenticated. Available code (UNAUTHORIZED)

post.description: Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token

200.description: Access token refreshed successfully. Available code (SUCCESS)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired refresh token. Available code (UNAUTHORIZED, INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN, REFRESH_TOKEN_NOT_ELIGIBLE[remaining_seconds])

get.description: Get all available permission modules with their permissions
Get list of roles with pagination and search

post.description: Create a new role. Validation: name REQUIRED, MIN 3, MAX 32; permissions REQUIRED, MIN 1

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

422.description: Role name already exists. Available code (ROLE_NAME_EXISTS)

get.description: Get role detail by ID with permissions

200.description: Role detail fetched successfully. Available code (DETAIL_FETCHED)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid ID. Available code (INVALID_PARAM_ID)

put.description: Update role name and permissions. Validation: name REQUIRED, MIN 3, MAX 32; permissions REQUIRED, MIN 1

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

422.description: Role not found or name already exists. Available code (ROLE_NOT_FOUND, ROLE_NAME_EXISTS)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid ID. Available code (INVALID_PARAM_ID)

post.description: Generate presigned Upload for file upload. Validation: mime-type REQUIRED, INVALID; filesize REQUIRED, MAX_FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED, MIN_FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED, GT 0; extensions REQUIRED, INVALID; type REQUIRED, must be one of (avatar)

200.description: Presigned Upload generated successfully. Available code (OK)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

get.description: Get list of users with pagination and search

post.description: Create a new user. Validation: email REQUIRED, EMAIL, MAX 255; name REQUIRED, ALPHASPACE, MIN 3, MAX 64; avatar REQUIRED, STARTSWITH "avatar:"

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

post.description:
Complete the getting started process for the user. Validation:
name = REQUIRED, ALPHASPACE, MIN 3, MAX 64
avatar = REQUIRED, STARTSWITH "avatar:"

200.description: Getting started process completed successfully. Available code (SUCCESS)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

401.description: Unauthorized - user not authenticated. Available code (UNAUTHORIZED)

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - validation failed. Available code (INVALID_CURRENT_STEP)

200.description: User detail fetched successfully. Available code (DETAIL_FETCHED)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid ID. Available code (INVALID_PARAM_ID)

put.description: Update user name and avatar. Validation: name REQUIRED, ALPHASPACE, MIN 3, MAX 64; avatar REQUIRED, STARTSWITH "avatar:"

400.description: Bad Request - invalid input data. Available code (VALIDATION_ERROR, BAD_REQUEST)

post.description: Update user status (active, inactive, banned). Validation: status must be one of active, inactive, banned

200.description: User status updated successfully. Available code (UPDATED)

400.description: Bad Request - invalid status. Available code (INVALID_PATH, VALIDATION_ERROR)

422.description: User has same status. Available code (USER_HAS_SAME_STATUS)
